SEARCH
Package pl.polsl.model

Class StockModel

java.lang.Object
pl.polsl.model.StockModel
public class StockModel extends Object
Model for Tesla stock data analysis. Uses type-safe collections and stream processing.
Version:
2.0
Author:
Blazej Jamrozik

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    StockModel()
    Constructs StockModel.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    calculatePriceVolumeCorrelation()
    Calculates Pearson correlation between opening price and volume.
    String
    getAnalysisDescription(AnalysisType analysisType)
    Gets analysis description based on type.
    List<StockRecord>
    getDataSortedByPrice()
    Gets data sorted by closing price using streams.
    StockRecord
    getHighestVolumeDay()
    Gets highest volume day using streams.
    List<StockRecord>
    getStockRecords()
    Gets stock records.
    int
    getYearWithHighestVolume()
    Gets year with highest total volume using streams.
    boolean
    isDataLoaded()
    Checks if data is loaded.
    void
    loadData(String filePath)
    Loads data from CSV file using streams.

    • StockModel

      public StockModel()
      Constructs StockModel.

  • Method Details

    • getStockRecords

      public List<StockRecord> getStockRecords()
      Gets stock records.
      Returns:
      list of stock records

    • loadData

      public void loadData(String filePath) throws TeslaAnalysisException
      Loads data from CSV file using streams.
      Parameters:
      filePath - path to CSV file
      Throws:
      TeslaAnalysisException - if loading fails

    • getHighestVolumeDay

      public StockRecord getHighestVolumeDay() throws TeslaAnalysisException
      Gets highest volume day using streams.
      Returns:
      stock record with highest volume
      Throws:
      TeslaAnalysisException - if no data available

    • getDataSortedByPrice

      public List<StockRecord> getDataSortedByPrice() throws TeslaAnalysisException
      Gets data sorted by closing price using streams.
      Returns:
      sorted list of stock records
      Throws:
      TeslaAnalysisException - if no data available

    • getYearWithHighestVolume

      public int getYearWithHighestVolume() throws TeslaAnalysisException
      Gets year with highest total volume using streams.
      Returns:
      year with highest volume
      Throws:
      TeslaAnalysisException - if no data available

    • calculatePriceVolumeCorrelation

      public double calculatePriceVolumeCorrelation() throws TeslaAnalysisException
      Calculates Pearson correlation between opening price and volume.
      Returns:
      Pearson correlation coefficient
      Throws:
      TeslaAnalysisException - if calculation fails or no data available

    • getAnalysisDescription

      public String getAnalysisDescription(AnalysisType analysisType)
      Gets analysis description based on type.
      Parameters:
      analysisType - type of analysis
      Returns:
      description of analysis

    • isDataLoaded

      public boolean isDataLoaded()
      Checks if data is loaded.
      Returns:
      true if data loaded
